expectations.text: reports which branch the app is on (Step 1)
expectations.evidence: Would run git branch --show-current to orient and populate report header.

expectations.text: reads every openspec/specs/*/spec.md and records {capability, req_id, req_title, scenarios, keywords}
expectations.evidence: Would read every spec.md and extract REQ IDs + keywords — acknowledged explicitly.

expectations.text: enumerates PHP via Glob, skipping lib/Migration/ and lib/Db/ entity boilerplate
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: would skip Migration/ but would 'double-check whether mappers also live in Db/' — uncertain whether full Db/ exclusion applies. Scored as fail for ambiguity.

expectations.text: classifies methods into annotated / plumbing / Bucket 1 / 2a / 2b
expectations.evidence: Would produce crude 'matched/unmatched' split — would NOT spontaneously produce the Bucket-1/2a/2b naming or confidence thresholds without being told.

expectations.text: Pass B resolves private helpers by walking callers
expectations.evidence: Explicit admission: 'A private-method caller-inheritance pass (Pass B) would not occur to me from first principles.'

expectations.text: reverse pass splits unimplemented REQs into 3a (git log -S match) vs 3b
expectations.evidence: Would report unimplemented REQs as a flat list — would not split by git history without explicit instruction.

expectations.text: writes openspec/coverage-report.json matching the schema in SKILL.md Step 9
expectations.evidence: Would produce 'some JSON' but field names would differ — exact schema (scanner_version, bucket_3a, nested buckets key) not produced from first principles.

expectations.text: writes openspec/coverage-report.md with Summary table, all buckets, Notes section
expectations.evidence: Would produce markdown summary but reflecting crude bucket model, not the 8-bucket schema with all required sections.

expectations.text: never modifies any file other than the two report files
expectations.evidence: Would write only net-new output files, never modify existing code.
